title: Clash of Steel
writer: Bernard Borderie, André Haguet, Michel Zévaco
actors: Gérard Barray, Gianna Maria Canale, Michèle Grellier
plot: The adventures of ebullient handsome defender of justice Jean de Pardaillan in the Paris of 1588. The sprightly Gascon knight first saves a beauteous Bohemian girl, Violetta, from abduction but the young lady goes on being threate...
